scenario.name: PUBLISH (presence)
scenario.send:
PUBLISH sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 PUBLISH Event: presence Expires: 3600 Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" entity="sip:[service]@[remote_ip]"> <tuple id="t1"> <status><basic>open</basic></status> <note>Available</note> </tuple> </presence>

PUBLISH sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 PUBLISH Event: presence Expires: 3600 SIP-If-Match: [$etag] Contact: <sip:[service]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/pidf+xml Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Length: [len]
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <presence xmlns="urn:ietf:params:xml:ns:pidf" entity="sip:[service]@[remote_ip]"> <tuple id="t1"> <status><basic>closed</basic></status> <note>Busy</note> </tuple> </presence>

PUBLISH sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 PUBLISH Event: presence Expires: 0 SIP-If-Match: [$etag] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: SIPp/siphon-test Content-Length: 0
